store_headline: WooCommerce Fashion Theme for Boutiques and Apparel Brands
store_subheadline: Lookbooks, popups, and a polished storefront for fashion boutiques and clothing brands
features: Elegant WooCommerce design with sophisticated aesthetics
Portfolio integration for brand storytelling and lookbooks
Promotional pop-up manager for new arrivals and offers
Product quick view and wishlist functionality
Elementor page builder for flexible layout customization
Wolf Core plugin with custom Elementor widgets
Contact forms for customer service and inquiries
One-click demo import with complete fashion store setup
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: Muted sage green palette — an immediately recognizable color identity no other fashion theme in the catalog shares
Lookbook integration for editorial product storytelling so collections present as campaigns, not just product grids
Slide-out lateral cart keeps shoppers in the browsing flow — boutique checkout UX that reduces abandonment
Built-in popup promotions for campaign launches and seasonal drops — no separate marketing plugin
The established boutique fashion WooCommerce choice in the catalog for independent apparel brands
Elementor-powered for boutique owners who run their store and update their site without developer support
Distinct from Alceste (streetwear), Prequelle (luxury), and Slikk (vintage) — Morvan owns the accessible feminine boutique lane
key_benefits: Sage-green editorial identity becomes part of the brand, not a forgettable canvas
Showcase collections as lookbooks that tell a visual story, not flat grids
Slide-out cart keeps shoppers on the collection page, reducing abandonment
Drive urgency with built-in popup promotions — no extra plugin needed
Stand visually distinct from mass-market and luxury fashion themes
Complete fashion e-commerce — storefront, lookbook, promotions — without multiple tools
design_features: Pop-up templates for promotions and announcements
Instagram gallery integration for lifestyle imagery
use_cases: Fashion Designer Portfolio and Sales Sites
